ops.title: repo-bootstrap SKILL.md: document .mcp.json as a cc-guides artifact
ops.description: Deferred from the 2026-07-17 .mcp.json managed-rollout because a concurrent gd-build session held uncommitted SKILL.md edits (shared-tree collision avoidance). Sibling prose in reference/base-conventions.md, reference/swift-stack.md, and plugin/guides/README.md ships with the rollout commit; only the two SKILL.md spots wait. See backlog task 5b82118 for the parent rollout.

ops.text: SKILL.md cc-guides prerequisite bullet enumerates .mcp.json among the composed artifacts
SKILL.md "What lands where" .mcp.json row describes .claude/fragments/.mcp.json/ composition (cc-skills:mcp-base + mcp-overrides; swift layers add cc-skills:mcp-swift), not the old copy-once template
